description: Backend: Add photos JSON field to CalendarEvent model + migration
steps: Write test for CalendarEvent with photos (tests/test_calendar_photos.py)
Add photos JSON column to models.py CalendarEvent class
Create Alembic migration: alembic revision --autogenerate -m 'add photos to calendar_events'
Apply migration: alembic upgrade head
Run test: pytest tests/test_calendar_photos.py -v
Commit

description: Backend: Update schemas + add photo upload/serve endpoints
steps: Add photos: list[str] = [] to CalendarEventResponse schema
Update _event_to_response helper to include photos
Add photo upload endpoint POST /{event_id}/photos with validation (5MB, 4 max, MIME check)
Add GET /photos/{filename} endpoint to serve photos
Write integration tests for photo upload + max photos limit
Run tests: pytest tests/test_calendar_photos.py -v
Commit

description: Backend: Update agent tool for photo_urls support in create_calendar_event
steps: Add photo_urls array param to create_calendar_event tool definition in TOOL_DEFINITIONS
Update _create_calendar_event handler to accept and store photo_urls
Run existing agent tests: pytest tests/test_chat_agent.py -v
Commit

description: iOS: Update CalendarEvent model + APIClient multipart + CalendarStore uploadPhoto
steps: Add photos: [String] field to CalendarEvent.swift model with CodingKeys
Add uploadMultipart() method to APIClient.swift
Add uploadEventPhoto() method to CalendarStore.swift
Build to verify: xcodebuild
Commit

description: iOS: Mode toggle + view routing in CalendarDrawer (calendar/timeline/singleDay)
steps: Add timeline localization strings to L.swift
Add CalendarMode enum and state to CalendarDrawer
Add mode toggle button to CalendarDrawer top bar
Route views based on mode with transitions
Build to verify: xcodebuild
Commit

description: iOS: MultiDayTimelineView with 4 zoom levels (day/week/month/year) + pinch gesture
steps: Create MultiDayTimelineView.swift with ZoomLevel enum and MagnificationGesture
Create DayRow sub-view with zoom-dependent sizing (dateFont, leftWidth, bottomPadding)
Implement 4 content variants: dayContent, weekContent, monthContent, yearContent
Build to verify: xcodebuild
Commit

description: iOS: HeatStripView — horizontal time distribution bar with pinch-to-zoom
steps: Create HeatStripView.swift with GeometryReader + event blocks positioned by time
Add MagnificationGesture for zoom (1x-3x)
Add time labels (6am-9pm)
Build to verify: xcodebuild
Commit

description: iOS: TimelineEventCard + SingleDayTimelineView with heat strip and swipe navigation
steps: Create TimelineEventCard.swift with left accent bar, category color, photo grid, pet name
Create SingleDayTimelineView.swift with date header, HeatStripView, event cards
Add swipe left/right DragGesture for day navigation
Build to verify: xcodebuild
Commit

description: iOS: Double-tap gesture on MonthGrid to enter single-day timeline
steps: Add onDoubleTap callback to MonthGrid
Add double-tap gesture to day cells (before single-tap)
Wire up in CalendarDrawer to set singleDayDate and switch to .singleDay mode
Build to verify: xcodebuild
Commit

description: Final integration: run all backend tests + iOS build + verify all views work together
steps: Run all backend tests: pytest tests/ -v
Build iOS: xcodebuild full build
Verify: mode toggle, multi-day timeline, pinch zoom, single-day view, heat strip, swipe nav, double-tap, pet filter, photo placeholders
Final commit
